summary:
In cases where sufficient bone support exists but significant loading needs mitigation due to injury or fragility concerns, the AO system recommends using techniques designed for distributing forces evenly across affected regions instead of concentrating them at specific sites prone to failure under high pressure conditions; this aligns well with current best practices aiming both functional recovery while ensuring minimal risk during healing processes through strategic use of less invasive methods when possible.
